---
name: Feature request
about: New intrinsic, kernel language feature, host API, or tooling improvement
labels: enhancement, TBD
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
One or two sentences on the gap this fills.

**Proposed API / behavior**
Show the Rust you would like to write (no need to get it right):

```rust
// example
```

**Alternatives considered**
Any workaround you are currently using and why it falls short.

**Additional context**
Links to PTX ISA spec, CUDA docs, or prior art are very welcome.

---
> Want to discuss the design before opening a full issue? Drop by [#contributors on Discord](https://discord.gg/Fua7DeKnm).
